name: Chicken Pasta Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, broccoli, carrot, and garlic in a 1-quart microwaveable casserole.
2. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 5-6 minutes, stirring after 3 minutes, until vegetables are tender and chicken is no longer pink in the center.
3. Add remaining ingredients; toss.
4. Microwave on high for 1-1/2 minutes or until hot.
